message:
test: add spawn --assign integration tests (bd-1tu58)

- Created internal/cli/spawn_assign_test.go with comprehensive tests
- Tests cover flag parsing (defaults, strategy, limit, ready-timeout)
- Tests cover integration with ntm assign command
- Tests cover combined output structure (SpawnAssignResult)
- Tests cover error handling (no agents, no beads, busy agents, partial failure)
- Tests cover strategy passthrough and init prompt integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
